recommendations.title: D.E.B.S.
recommendations.overview: The star of a team of teenage crime fighters falls for the alluring villainess she must bring to justice.

recommendations.title: Free to Play
recommendations.overview: Follow three professional video game players as they overcome personal adversity, family pressures, and the realities of life to compete in a $1,000,000 tournament that could change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Holy Goalie
recommendations.overview: A young priest coaches a team of uncoordinated monks in order to win a soccer tournament and save their monastery from being turned into a hotel.

recommendations.title: Back of the Net
recommendations.overview: A new student at a soccer academy is determined to beat her rival's team in the national tournament.

recommendations.title: The Campaign
recommendations.overview: Two rival politicians compete to win an election to represent their small North Carolina congressional district in the United States House of Representatives.

recommendations.title: Undisputed III: Redemption
recommendations.overview: Russian inmate Boyka, now severely hobbled by the knee injury suffered at the end of Undisputed 2. No longer the feared prison fighter he was, he has declined so far that he is now good only for cleaning toilets. But when a new prison fight tournamen

recommendations.title: Double World
recommendations.overview: Keen to bring honor to his clan, young villager Dong Yilong embarks on a perilous journey to compete in a tournament that selects warriors for battle.

recommendations.title: Letters from Iwo Jima
recommendations.overview: The story of the battle of Iwo Jima between the United States and Imperial Japan during World War II, as told from the perspective of the Japanese who fought it.

recommendations.title: Godless Youth
recommendations.overview: German students compete to enter one of the country's elite schools.

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: War between two Irish youth gangs consists of removing and retrieving buttons from each other's clothing.
